summary:
PROPHETIC INSTRUCTIONS AND POSTURE: Brandon shares that he received correction and instruction in a dream from a spiritual general, prompting him to shift his spiritual focus. He emphasizes a message from the Lord urging believers not to pray about current news, which is already in the past, but to pray proactively into future events. Brandon stresses the importance of believers maintaining peace, relying on scriptures like Psalm 29:11 and Psalm 91, and developing a strong spiritual backbone. He warns that dark days are approaching, requiring the church to take dominion and reject fear.

GLOBAL REGIME CHANGES AND REVIVALS: Brandon rejoices over the death of Ayatollah Khamenei, viewing it as divine intervention to protect the underground church and spark a great revival in Iran. He prophesies upcoming shakings and regime changes across Iran, Pakistan, Afghanistan, and other Arab nations. Furthermore, Brandon anticipates a massive harvest of souls throughout South America, specifically mentioning Cuba, Colombia, Costa Rica, and Brazil. He urges prayer for the removal of current Cuban leadership and foresees a new conservative leader rising in Mexico to combat drug cartels, along with mercenary groups rescuing trafficked children from corrupt networks.

POLITICAL FORECASTS AND DOMESTIC AFFAIRS: Brandon details prophetic visions concerning American political figures, highlighting Marco Rubio as a rising leader who will be tasked with handling cartel issues in Cuba, Mexico, and Venezuela. He warns of a two-faced, chameleon-like individual attempting to sabotage these efforts. Brandon also mentions a conservative African American politician in Florida named Brian, who is being polished for a greater leadership role. Additionally, he foresees economic restoration involving cryptocurrency spearheaded by Don Jr. Trump and Eric Trump, while warning of deep state interference and political theater during upcoming midterms.

MILITARY THREATS AND UNDERGROUND WEAPONS: Brandon describes vivid visions of a coordinated global assault involving Russia, China, North Korea, and Turkey. He details a highly secretive operation within Iran where biological weapons, including mustard gas and anthrax, are being transported on underground railroads through extensive cave systems. These weapons, guarded by men in military fatigues and black berets, are being moved closer to Israel for a retaliatory strike. Brandon calls for divine exposure of these underground tunnel networks and prays for American and Israeli intelligence to neutralize the threats using bunker-busting munitions before they can be deployed.

ANTISEMITISM AND FUTURE SHAKINGS: Brandon warns of a rising, Hitler-like spirit of antisemitism that will spread globally, causing Jewish people to flee to Israel in a biblically significant migration. He prophesies that God will miraculously defend Israel, likening the upcoming divine intervention to the parting of the Red Sea. Domestically, Brandon predicts a sudden, 24-hour period of unprecedented shaking in America, marked by a nationwide emergency phone alert similar to an Amber Alert. This event will trigger a mass migration of citizens fleeing the eastern states toward the south with only their bare essentials, ultimately leading to a massive spiritual awakening and the filling of churches.

PERSONAL DISCIPLINE AND SPIRITUAL READINESS: Brandon reflects on his own need for physical and spiritual discipline, mentioning his recent weight loss and commitment to a healthier lifestyle to remain a usable vessel for God. He emphasizes that the upcoming global shakings are meant to awaken a slumbering church. Brandon urges believers to cultivate an intimate, daily relationship with Jesus, warning that the church must be prepared to minister to the massive influx of desperate people seeking guidance and answers during the impending crises.
rawData: [March 01, 2026]-[Pray with me - we have work to do]-[https://youtu.be/5u6wPxLzE9E]-[Evening family. Thank you for joining me today. We're going to pray. We have work to do, as everybody can see on the news. As I've been praying over all this today—I made those two videos for you yesterday—I had a dream last night. The Lord visited me. It was actually an encounter I've never had before, but it shook me a little bit because it was instruction and correction from one of my prayer generals. It was amazing, and I'm not going to get into it until I understand it all, but I was visited by somebody and the Lord spoke to me in a dream through this individual; it was correction regarding some things. I know that probably won't make sense to some of you because this is like spiritual algebra, but I'm going to go a different direction tonight with some of the things the Lord has instructed me to do. I thought this was Carmex for your lips. I sat here and thought, 'What kind of new lip balm is this?' So I'm putting it on my lips and my son said, 'Dad, that's glue.' I said, 'Oh, glue stick. Duh.' I had to wipe my face off real quick because it was stinging. Regarding the encounter, I don't want to talk about that. I'm just going to give you some scripture that I've been meditating on: Psalm 29:11. 'The Lord will give strength unto his people; the Lord will bless his people with peace.' Right now, I believe that scripture stands really strong for me. The Lord will give his people peace and strength. Right now, we need strength and peace. But I know what the Lord is instructing me because I asked, 'What do you want me to say tonight?' He said, 'Remind them: don't pray the news.' If you're praying the news, you're behind. Everything that we have seen over the last year and a half led up to this point. We've been praying over this for weeks—what the Holy Spirit warned us about concerning drones, missile attacks, and Tel Aviv—and yesterday, what the Lord showed us about Taiwan. We're praying into the future. We don't pray into the past and the present; we're praying into the future and what God has for us weeks from now. So, we're not going to camp around what the news is telling us. Regarding Ayatollah Khamenei, I rejoice that a dictator, an evil man, is no longer in power. I pray he found Jesus in the last seconds of his life. If he didn't, he's in hell. We know that God had His hand in this to remove evil men from torturing Christians and the underground church. Great persecution was coming on the church of Iran over the last few decades, and we know what the Lord showed us prior to this: the Lord said, 'I want to bring a great revival to the people of Iran.' In doing so, there will be a regime change. There's going to be a shaking in Iran, Pakistan, Afghanistan, and all of the Arab nations. Here we are, seeing this. Why? Because the Lord said, 'Brandon, you're not waiting on me to come back; I'm waiting on you. Bring in my harvest and I'll come and get you.' The harvest is plentiful and the laborers are few. What we're about to see is the superhighway above us with translations. If you are walking with the Father, you're going to be here and you're going to be there, and we're going to be ministering to people because He said there's been a door that's been closed to the body of Christ for so long. In the days ahead, I'm going to open this door and it's going to flood wide the gates. You're going to see one of the greatest harvests of souls throughout South America—Cuba, Colombia, and Costa Rica—all of it. I saw a major harvest of souls through Brazil. I'm telling you, ladies and gentlemen, after this is over, Cuba is next. It could happen at the same time. This is what we were praying into over the last 48 hours. We're praying for the leadership of Cuba to change. We're praying for Claudia to be removed, for a new leader who looks like Antonio Banderas—a great, conservative leader—to rise up in Mexico, and for the drug cartel to be dealt with. I saw three more leaders being taken out in the days ahead, and mercenary groups coming in, hired by family members to come and find their children who are being trafficked. I saw a young girl last night who was blonde-headed, and the Lord said, 'Pray for this young girl.' I saw corrupt law enforcement involved in this and all kinds of things. If you go back and watch that video, that was a very detailed vision of what we're going to be praying. It felt like, 'Lord, why are you not concerned about what's going on right now?' No, you've already prayed over that. That's old news. That's going to be at the bottom of the birdcage in the next couple of days. The bird's going to use that as toilet paper. You don't want to be praying toilet paper; you want to be praying what I'm calling you to, way ahead in advance. That's why if you're following the Spirit of God, those that are the sons of God are led by the Spirit of God. I believe that's where we are as the body of Christ. We're playing whack-a-mole. We know where the mole is coming from and we hit it with that stick right before he sticks his head out. The Lord is telling us right now to pray over this revival concerning our churches. He has Easter on our hearts to pray over the 250-year anniversary. We're praying against anti-Semitism. He's warned us about that spreading throughout the nation, Australia, and the world—great persecution against the Jewish people for what's happening today. I saw great protests and anti-Semitism making it very hard for Jewish people to live in communities around the United States and the world. As this happened, I saw them being uprooted and taken back to Israel. The Lord said, 'This is biblical.' So, we're not worried about what we see on the news right now. Why? Because the Lord will give strength unto His people and bless them with peace. We're at peace; we're not upset because we know what's coming before it comes. The true watchmen are warning you. If you're following false prophets, they don't know; they're giving you some sugarcoated word and everything's going to be okay. I'm not here to tell you everything's going to be okay. I'm telling you it's time for the church to get a backbone like a crowbar and take dominion and authority, or you're going to be in trouble. The Lord said great dark days are upon the world, but behold, it's time for the church to arise and shine, for the light has come and the glory of the Lord is risen on us, church. But it's going to take people rising up and being who they're supposed to be in these last days and saying, "Thus far, Satan, and no further. You're not going to mess with me. You're not going to mess with my children. You're not going to mess with my finances. You're going to let go of it in the name of Jesus. We have dominion and authority over you. I'm seated with him in the heavenlies far above all principalities and powers." I talked to Sister Billy today on the phone. I sure love my spiritual mama. When you talk to the elders, I always bounce things off of them to see where they are, where the pulse is, and everything. And she said, "Brandon, did you not know?" Let me see her text. She texted me this after. I didn't read over this very well, so please don't butcher me for reading badly. She said, "This is Shabbat. The weekly portion read in the synagogues was from Deuteronomy 25:17-19." She was talking about where we are in these end times and how significant the Ayatollah Khamenei being removed at this exact day going into the third with the blood moon on this time frame. Folks, do you realize how close Jesus is to coming back? That's why I try to teach you, and I would love to have her on one day so she could teach you all about the Greek, the Hebrew, and all that, because she is an expert at it, and going over Haman and how he was dealt with. I look at the type and shadow, the mirror of where we are. What happened today is a mirror of what happened in the Bible. It's amazing. I just go, "Oh, what a plan. Oh, what a planner." And I just go, the only one that could do this is the hand of the Lord. This isn't just normal. We are living in the last of the last days. I encourage you, if you're upset inside today and you're fearful of all the things that I'm seeing, and I live in this area and people are freaked out, the Lord said the Lord will give strength unto his people. This is Psalms 29:11. The Lord will give strength unto his people. The Lord will bless his people with peace. I believe with all my heart that we are a people that walks in peace and we're not going to be tormented by fear of what we see on the news. I'm not ever trying to scare you; I'm trying to prepare you. I'm trying to warn you of what I see coming as a watchman to tell you this is the darkness of the hour. It's going to get dark, and it's going to get really light in the church, but it's going to take you knowing who you are. If you don't know Psalms 91 and Psalms 23, the Lord said you're in trouble. You need to understand, not just read it once. I'm talking about being rooted and grounded in the word of God, having that foundation of a rhema word inside of you, knowing who you are in these last days. Knowing that no weapon formed against you is going to prosper. I don't care if a thousand of those rockets are flying by my head and 10,000 on my right hand. Nothing shall come near me. Why? Because he keeps his angels and gives his angels charge over me to bear me up in their hands lest I dash my foot against a stone. I believe every one of us all around the world is about to see things we never thought we would see. A lot of people didn't want to see it, but we're seeing it, and a great shaking to awaken even in America, the Lord said, will come in the days ahead, and the church will wake up out of their slumber. So, are we afraid? No, we're not afraid. We have peace. The Lord will bless his people with peace. I stay in that peace that passes all understanding because my mind is stayed on him because I trust in him. Why? Because he has my life. Well, what happens, Brandon, if something takes you out and you go home early? To be absent from the body is to be present with the Lord. I still win. The moment I take my last breath on this earth, I'm going to be with my maker. I'm going to be standing before a holy God and I'm going to say, "Thank you, Father." And just like Kathryn Kuhlman said all the time, "Lord, I don't have to tell him I love him. Oh, I loved you, Lord. Why do I have to tell him? Because I showed him every day by what I did that I loved him." What we do right now is a display of our love. I don't have to tell you that I love my father. I'm showing you right now. I'm telling you that Jesus Christ is coming. It's time to get your heart right. You need to repent. You're running out of time. If you're living in compromise, if you're living in sin, if you're sleeping around, if you're drinking, you're partying, you're acting like the world, and there's no difference between you and the church, you need to repent. You need to come underneath a holy God and say, "God, I'm a sinner, and I need a savior, and I repent of my sins. Today is my day, and I turn from it." You're running out of time. There's many people that went home today that didn't think they were going home. You need to be at the right place at the right time heeding your Father's instructions, for those that are led by the Spirit of God are the sons of God. I will be led by the Spirit of God because I'm his son and you're his daughter and you're his son. I just want to encourage you, don't get weary in well-doing as we see all this going on. As the day approaches, fearful sights we will see that will bring a lot of people to their knees. My knees are already bent. Why? Because I'm looking at him. I'm staying vertical. You must stay vertical in the days ahead. You must keep a vertical eye. I'm not going horizontal like my friend Billy always says. Billy B, I go vertical. Go vertical with him. You must find him. Not just know about him. You must have intimate relationship with the Father in the days ahead. Keep your eyes on Jesus for we have entered into even darker days. I told people of authority today about what I saw concerning Cuba, what I saw concerning the smuggling in these certain towns on the border. In relaying this, I believe they have information enough that we will hear it in the news one day. Why? Because we trust. We don't have to be stirred up on social media. I trust, I'm going vertical. You've got this, Father. You didn't reveal this to me by your hand and by your spirit for me to be like a chicken with my head cut off. I keep peace. Why? Because he said it in his word right here. Psalms 29:11. The Lord will give strength unto his people. I have strength because he's inside of me. I've went vertical. The Lord will bless his people with peace. I will receive peace from you, Father. I'm not stirred up by all this on the news. So, we're not going to pray the news tonight. All that being said, I'm not praying the news. I'm praying this heart. But first, you have to silence yourself in your flesh and all the, "Oh, what are we going to do?" No, I'm not worried about doing anything. I'm trusting confidently in you and I'm staying vertical that you've got me and you'll show me that which is to come. The Holy Spirit already said he will teach us and show us that which is to come. Why? Because we trust in you, Lord. We're trusting in you. You're going to show us that which is to come. So, we take communion and we sit here and we take the care out of our prayer. We're careful for nothing. Bring that scripture up, son. 'Careful for nothing. With thanksgiving, let your requests be made known unto God with thanksgiving.' So, we're just going to thank him. We're just going to take the time right now to give God some praise for a little bit. And we're going to take the care out of our prayer. You got it? I don't know why my keyboard's not working. Your keyboard's not working? Well, it's time to buy a new keyboard. 'Be anxious for nothing.' Here it is. Philippians 4:6. 'Be anxious for nothing.' That's where we are, church. We're going to be anxious for nothing, but in everything by prayer and supplication with thanksgiving, let your requests be made known unto God. And the peace—again, there's that peace—and the peace of God which surpasseth all understanding will guard your hearts and minds through Christ Jesus. But first, we've got to get in that place of thanksgiving. So, what are we going to thank him for? Thank you, Father, for protecting our troops so far. I don't know of any casualties of any servicemen or women on our boats. There are no drone attacks. We give you praise and thanksgiving that there's not been any attack on American soil today. Father, I thank you, Lord, that tomorrow as our churches gather and we have our services, every church service is protected by the blood of Jesus. Every plan, every plot of the enemy is found out in the name of Jesus. Father, we thank you. We give you praise, Father, that we're able to have prayer tonight. Thank you, Lord, that we have our bills paid, that the internet's paid, that this thing works, the camera phone works. Lord, thank you for my camera phone, for the iPhone that you provided. Thank you, Lord, that you took care of us, Father, and that we're able to do this live broadcast and pray as a family together. We give you all glory. Put that scripture back. We give you all glory, honor, and praise, Father, for everything because we're not going to be anxious for nothing. We're not going to have anxiety about nothing. But in everything by prayer and supplication with thanksgiving, we're letting our requests be made known unto God. And the peace of God which surpasses understanding will guard your heart and mind through Christ Jesus. Finally, brethren, whatever things are true, whatever things are noble, whatever things are just, whatever things are pure, whatever things are lovely, whatever things are of a good report, if there be any virtue, if there be anything praiseworthy, meditate on these things. We're going to meditate on those things tonight. And so, we just give our praise to you, Father. Father, I know you have our lives in your hand and we trust you. We're not going to have anxiety about what we're seeing. 'What are they going to do in America?' Nothing. We're not going to allow them to. We're the blood-bought church, the redeemed. We take our authority tonight. And we give you praise, Father, for protecting our pastors. You protect our pastors. You're giving them a fresh new word. You're stirring them and waking them up tonight. They're going to re-preach righteousness and truth. They're going to preach repentance for the coming of the Lord is at hand. And it's time for the church to get a backbone like a crowbar. And Father, I thank you, Lord, that you start with our church. You search me and know me, Lord. For the eyes of the Lord run to and fro throughout the whole earth, looking for a heart who's perfect toward him. Let your eyes rest upon my family tonight, Lord. Thank you, Lord, that peace, and the peace of God which surpasses all understanding will guard your hearts and minds through Christ Jesus. It's going to guard my mind. Why? Because 2 Timothy 1:7 says that God has not given me a spirit of fear, but of power and of love and of a well-balanced mind. I have a balanced mind. And that peace that passes all understanding, it's guarding my heart, it's guarding my mind because I'm staying vertical. I'm not going horizontal. 'What's going on the news? Oh no, look at X is going nuts. Look at all this stuff.' No, I'm going vertical, and the peace that passes our understanding. You have to make a choice right now because of what we're about to see with volcanoes, shakings, and earthquakes, with manipulated weather modification and all the things with wars and weapons that we've never seen before. You have to make a choice right now to stay in that place of peace and thanksgiving regardless of what you see on the news. I'm not moved by what I see. I'm not moved by what I feel. I'm moved by what the word of God says. And he said he's never seen the righteous forsaken nor a seed begging bread. He'll provide for me even if the economy crashes tomorrow. He said he'll provide for me. I'm never going to lack any good thing. My God shall supply all my needs according to his riches and glory by Christ Jesus. Either you believe it or you don't. He's a healer. 'Well, there's a plague, Brandon. Did you know there's a plague coming?' I've already told you what the Lord said. A major plague that's worse than the black death is coming. But he said, 'If you know who you are and you know what this is, as communion, and you take this communion daily and you come up underneath him and sit at his feet, nothing shall by any means hurt you. Nothing, not one thing.' Why? I'm not afraid of the terror by night, nor for the arrow that flieth by day, the pestilence that walks in darkness. I'm not going to let that bother me. Why? Because I'm a king's kid and I come underneath that with covenant. And I believe that he's a covenant-keeping God. And greater is he that is in me than he that is in the world. A thousand shall fall at my side and ten thousand at my right hand, but nothing shall come nigh me. People say, 'Brandon, you're bold. You say a lot of things on there.' Why? Because I'm already a dead man. I'm not afraid. I already know where I go. I've already seen heaven. My son knows. The moment I take my last breath, I'll be standing before my friend. He's my friend. He visits me. I want you to know it's not religion to me; it's relationship. He is my friend. Do I have everything right? Do I get everything right all the time? No. That's called human humanity. But in the midst of my failures and my mess-ups, grace is there. Even whenever I mess up with prophetic stuff, I say, 'God, have mercy on me. Forgive me. I want to be more accurate. Make me sharp like an arrow. Make me sharper. Help me. I don't want to cause any confusion in the church.' But folks, we all have sinned and come short of the glory. We've all messed up. But it's the moment you pick yourself up and say, 'Father, you're dealing with some flesh here. And I thank you, Lord, that your grace is sufficient for me today.' I'm just a human, just like you are, and I'm saved by grace just like you are. And I put my pants on the same way you do, take a bath, got stinky armpits just like you do. But I choose to follow a holy God that loves me and says, 'God, help me. Help me.' As I come across these people that have no idea that you're coming. If you spend time with him daily, you'll find him. Those that seek me will find me. Those that knock, I'll open the door. And I truly believe right now we're at a place where you need to be knocking and seeking him like never before. So let's pray... we're just going to jump right in this river here, and we're going to take communion together and we're going to pray over our troops. We'll just pray, but I'm not going to pray the news. We're going to pray this in the spirit and if he shows us something new tonight, fine. I don't use him; he uses me. I don't control the gift. If there's a vision that comes and God wants to show me something to warn the people, then fine. We're not here to perform. This isn't about Brandon. It's not a Brandon show. It's not a performance. This is about Jesus and it's about him, and he gets all the glory, all the honor, and all the praise, and will continue to do so. And if he's finished using me, I'll ride away into the sunset. It never was about me in the first place. It was always about giving him the glory and always giving him the honor. If it draws too much attention to me, you're in trouble. He will share his glory with no one. You need to understand this for what's coming. Never take the miracles for granted and never take the glory for anything. You did nothing; you're just a vessel. He could have used anyone watching me right now, but he used me today. Will he use me again? I don't know; I pray he does. I'm here if he wants to, but I always give him the glory. I'm just a vessel. Do you understand? I have a treasure in an earthen vessel that the excellency of the power is known of him and not of me. It's not about Brandon. There are a lot of people wanting to show all these Instagram posts and all this stuff. Social media is trash. Let's give God praise tonight. I believe as we do that and he gets the glory, we attract and deflect, and we always tell the people, he'll use you more and more because he can trust you. Father, I thank you Lord for the body. I thank you Lord for all that you've done for us. We yield to you. We yield to the anointing. I yield to the anointing of the prophetic. I yield to the anointing of the watchman. And Father, if there's anything that I can help you with tonight, I'm here. If there's not, Lord, then we'll just pray and give you more glory and praise and honor and we'll close this thing off. Father, I thank you, Lord, that I'll not do anything unless I hear you and what you want me to do. I've always said we yield to you. Just like William Seymour put the box on his head. You say, "Brandon, find your box. What is the box? What is it that I have for you to do? Find your box." Just like William Seymour. Until Seymour found that box, Lord, you said the glory didn't come in the Azusa street mission. So, I find my box. All the glory, honor, and praise, Father. We take this body in the name of Jesus. And we thank you, Lord, that by your stripes we're healed. We thank you, Lord, that we don't have to have sickness in our bodies anymore. According to Galatians 3, Christ redeemed me from the curse of the law. And I thank you, Father, for your healing power that flows on the inside of us and we receive it. And there's an expiration date right now for every one of your infirmities in your body. You say, "Well, Brandon, I need this and this and this." There's an expiration date for it, and today is your day of turnaround. I believe that with you. Why not today? The Lord said to me, "Why always believe for tomorrow? Why not believe for now? Believe for now. Stay in the place of now." Now faith is the substance of things hoped for and evidence of things not seen. Now faith is not tomorrow. Now faith is: I believe I receive everything you have for me and I lack no good thing, and we take this body in the name of Jesus. Amen and amen. The joy of the Lord is our strength. We take the blood and we apply the blood and we make much of the blood, and the blood makes much of us. We apply the blood over us, Father, and we decrease and you increase. Forgive us of our sins. Forgive us of where we've messed up today. And we thank you, Lord, that we're not sin conscious; we're grace conscious. We're so grateful for what you did. But I always come before your throne boldly by the blood. And I come before you and say, "Father, thank you for what you did for me." And I take this right now in Jesus name. And I apply it over this atmosphere, over my house, over my children, over my wife, over my finances, over my dogs, over my car. Thank you, Lord. Father, I thank you, Lord. I thank you, Lord. Uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. I apply the blood of Jesus and thank you Lord that Uriel is here, my big angel to protect with the swords and shields up, ready to defend in the name of Jesus. Amen and amen. Well, praise the Lord. Now, no demonic spirit is going to bother me. Why? Because I'm underneath his covering right now. I'm underneath those wings. He that dwells in the secret place of the most high shall abide under the shadow of the almighty. I will say of the Lord, "He is my refuge and my fortress. My God, in him will I trust." Thank you. I trust you. I trust you. I got my lemon water tonight. I'm excited over this week now. I'm down five pounds. All glory to God. Five pounds today. It's a start. As I told Sister Billy, I said, "It's a start." She said, "Brandon, it's a start." I said, "Yeah, you got to start somewhere. Five pounds." It keeps coming. Some things that are good for you don't taste good. Doesn't it? Father, we just give you praise and glory. We sit at your feet, Father, and we just worship you. What's on your heart today, Lord, right now? We glorify your name in all the earth. We glorify your name. We glorify your name. We glorify your name in all the earth. We magnify your name. Holy, holy, holy. Holy, holy are you, Lord. I can sing that one song, Father. We can go in that worship direction. I love that song. We can sing it real low. I'll turn it down so it's not so loud tonight. This is Kim Clement. "Spirit come as I lift my hands to you, Holy Spirit. Come as I lift my soul to you." As I lift my soul to you, I can feel your spirit. As I lift my hands to you as I sing my song to you. I can feel your spirit as I lift my hands to you. As I sing my song to you, I can feel your spirit. As I lift my hands to you. I can feel your spirit this morning with the spirit of God. We want you to come. As I lift my soul to you, I want you to sing with me. I feel as I lift my hands to you, deep calling unto deep. I want you to lift your hands up. I want you to lift your voice up. Won't you give him praise today? Yes. 'Cause there's only one Lord. There's only one God that we know who he is. Would you lift your voice and say his name? Jehovah God. Come on. Come on. Lift your hands and praise him. Everybody in the house say his name. I want you to say his name. Oh yes. You are the lion, the great I am. You are the lion, the great I am. You are the lion, the great I am. You are the great I am in the house. One more time. Okay. This is what I see. For he has slain his thousands, and Marco Rubio has tens of thousands. Concerning the next term, the echo of this, concerning this assault, concerning the new David, concerning the one that God would raise up to take the baton. For the deep state interferes with the one. There's darkness in the heart of a hardhearted man concerning the next chapter of what I want to call Rubio. Pray for the strength for Rubio, for he has slain his tens of thousands.
